name: Jintai Energy Holdings Limited
summary: Jintai Energy Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in energy trading business primarily in the People's Republic of China. Its energy trading activities primarily comprise trading of fuel oil, kerosene, and chemical products. The company is also involved in the manufacture and trading of speakers; asset management businesses; and operation of an oil trade center. In addition, it provides oil and gas development engineering construction, and technical services, including geochemical exploration, drilled wells, test logging, downhole special operation, engineering building design, and construction services, as well as related oil and gas development technology research and development, and services. The company was formerly known as Yuhua Energy Holdings Limited and changed its name to Jintai Energy Holdings Limited in February 2020. Jintai Energy Holdings Limited was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Dongying, the People's Republic of China.
